final:
module shift_register(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    input wire data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        data_out <= 8'd0;
    end else if (en) begin
        data_out <= {data_out[6:0], data_in};
    end
end

endmodule
